creator: jdp@polstra.com
text:
This PR was closed for the wrong reason.  The reported problem was
caused by the kernel being built with the undocumented option
"options DEBUG" in the config file.  Don't do that.
--
   John Polstra                                       jdp@polstra.com
   John D. Polstra & Co., Inc.                Seattle, Washington USA
   "Self-knowledge is always bad news."                 -- John Barth
